title: rubus × toussaintii
intro: Rubus × toussaintii, also known as the Toussaint Raspberry, is a hybrid raspberry species that combines the characteristics of Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × toussaintii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × toussaintii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and nutritional properties.
